race.description: The Federal Hotel Swan Hill Mdn Plate
race.comment: KING'S ANCHOR (6) found the line nicely last start to get up for second over 1300m at Bendigo when returning from a spell. Better for that, suited by the rise in trip and draws to advantage. HOPELESS ROMANTIC (5) has found only one better at only two runs and should relish getting to 1600m for the first time. ANGEL'S GATHERING (1) finished in the money last start running third at Stawell and should strip fitter for past attempts, rates one of the chances. BLUE TYPHOON (10) went down narrowly last start when well in commission, finishing second at Mildura over 1400m, beaten only a head. In the mix.
